reviews.review_msg: If you go to his tutorial you will learn everything you need to know. Whenever you ask him a question he is extremely helpful and really likes the fact that his students are involved. If you participate in tutorial you will get a way better mark!

John Craig is simply the most passionate and wise Prof I've ever had during my Post-Secondary journey; there is a lot of reading but it is well worth it because of the passion put into his lecturing. I shared an hour with John outside of Class hours and I left the conversation feeling as if I was 1) respected, 2) appreciated, and 3) more wise.

OH MY GOD! I took this class as an elective and it was the worst decision of my life! DO NOT TAKE AS AN ELECTIVE! Crazy amount of readings in old english!!!!! And its so subjective to the TA how well your writing assignments are. It was not worth an elective.

prof. Bidnall is clearly interested in her work, her lectures are well thought out and well done. you have to go to class to know enough. her finals and midterms are hard but if you study you should be ok
